title: Add libkrun Mac task
body:
***Depends on:*** https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/208 + deployment into worker pool.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[Initial test-run](https://cirrus-ci.com/build/4881385851191296)

* [All but one (not a flake) of the Mac PM tests](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5839717474762752/html/mac-libkrun-podman-darwin-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--run-basic-podman-commands-Volume-ops--1) pass w/ libkrun.  Looked at the code for the failure, can't understand the test or why it would fail with a "file no found" error.
* All of the Mac PM tests fail w/ applehv.  Suspect it has to do with needing to [comment out the installation of vfkit](https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/208/files#diff-c7b3919ab213fd4e5482b33d84260f35a9d5d36f2bc97d8550e5c84fe8c9db96R86-R88)[0].

0. Note: w/o `brew install vfkit` commented out, the `brew install krunkit` command fails with some "unlink" error.  It's essentially complaining that `/some/path/bin/vfkit` already exists.
Testing note: Confirmed (expected) libkrun tests all fail when run on Mac's w/o libkrun.

@edsantiago and/or @baude if you want to give the first two commits an initial look over, this PR is code-complete once https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/208 is merged and deployed to the pool management VM (after I'm back from PTO).

FYI- I'll be off on PTO next week, so won't be enabling libkrun testing in Podman until I return.  There are [changes needed on the Mac's](https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/208) used for CI and I don't want to risk breaking something while I'm away.

[The libkrun mac tests are also passing](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5586253435895808).  I will merge https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/208 shortly, then after a day or so this PR can have final review and testing performed (i.e. after the pool has updated).
This PR can move forward on/after 2024-08-01T18:50:12+00:00, by then all the Macs in the pool will be running the new setup.

Force-push:
* Removed `DO NOT MERGE` commit to clear up diff (this still isn't ready to merge).
* Renamed mac `TEST_FLAVOR` values to be consistent w/ other podman-machine testing tasks.
  (so they all sort together in the status page).
This is ready for final review and (assuming CI passes) merging.

Looks like the MacOS PM tests are both green, [applehv](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5284978806751232/html/machine-applehv-podman-darwin-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html) and [libkrun](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6410878713593856/html/machine-libkrun-podman-darwin-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html)
